GeniesWishesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyWildFeature1: Any wins involving Wild symbols are multiplied by x2 except during Wild Wishes Feature.
GeniesWishesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyMysteryWildFeature1: While the reels are spinning during any main game spin, 1 to 5 stacked Wild symbol may be added on the reels.
GeniesWishesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature1: 3, 4 or 5 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature.
GeniesWishesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature2: Players may choose to start the Free Spins Feature with: 12 free spins with all high payout symbols, 8 free spins with travelling Wild symbols or 5 free spins with increasing multiplier.
GeniesWishesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature3: If no selection is made after 30 seconds, a feature will be randomly chosen.
GeniesWishesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature4: During the 12 free spins with all high payout symbols, only high payout symbols are on the reels (including Wild symbol and +1 Free Spin symbol) and all pokers symbols are removed from the reels.
GeniesWishesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature5: During the 8 free spins with travelling Wild symbol, any Wild symbol that appears on the reels will remain and shift to the reel on its left in the next spin until it reaches reel 1.
GeniesWishesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature6: During the 5 free spins with increasing multiplier, the win multiplier in the free spins starts at x5 and every free spin increases the multiplier by 5. (The maximum multiplier value achievable is x100)
GeniesWishesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature7: 1 free spin is awarded for each +1 Free Spin symbol on the reels (if any).
GeniesWishesPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue1: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol and +1 Free Spin symbol.
GeniesWishesPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue2: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
GeniesWishesPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue3: Scatter symbol does not appear during the Free Spins Feature.

GeniesWishesRules.GeneralRules1: Genie's 3 Wishes is a 5-reel, 3-row video slot featuring Free Spins Feature with various feature selections including high payout symbols, travelling Wild symbols, and increasing multiplier.

GeneralRules2.value: The game is played with 25 base bet for 243 ways (fixed), bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GeneralRules2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be minimum bet level, maximum max level, minimum bet size and maximum bet size in numeric form.
GeneralRules2.example: The game is played with 25 base bet for 243 ways (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.05 to 50.

GeniesWishesRules.GeneralRules3: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
